subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath spoken a Word whereby the fragrance of utterance was stirred, the ocean of certitude surged, and all things were moved to speech [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تکلم بکلمه بها هاج عرف البیان و ماج بحر الایقان و نطقت الاشیاء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @proclamation to the people of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital
